message:
test(pthread): MR absorbing states + blocks⇒success invariant (bd-nqoa)

Three condvar contract proptests completing the parity with the mutex
contract suite (bd-73gu):

prop_destroyed_absorbs_non_init_ops
  Destroyed + {Destroy,Wait,TimedWait,Signal,Broadcast} returns EINVAL
  with state preserved and blocks=false.

prop_uninitialized_absorbs_non_init_ops
  Symmetric trap semantics for the Uninitialized sink.

prop_blocks_implies_success
  Structural invariant over state × op × has_waiters: if outcome.blocks,
  outcome.errno must be 0. A blocking failure is a contradiction —
  the caller must either acquire or return immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
